§6Crude Oil§f

§aExtract the most important fluid in the mod — crude oil powers your progression from basic combustion to advanced petrochemistry!§f

Crude Oil is a flammable, viscous, polluting liquid found in underground oil deposits deep below the surface. Each deposit block holds §e250mB§f of crude oil, and when burned it provides §e25.0 kTU§f per bucket. It is the foundation of nearly every advanced material and machine chain in HBM.

§6Production§f:
Crude Oil is extracted from deposit blocks deep underground. Use an §bOil Reservoir Detector§f to scan for deposits — it will ping §eorange§f when near a deposit and §egreen§f when directly above one. To extract oil, place either an §bOil Derrick§f (cheaper, slower) or a §bPumpjack§f (more efficient) above the deposit and supply it with power. The pumpjack is §e3×§f more efficient than the derrick.

Extracting oil also produces §bNatural Gas§f as a byproduct. Store it in tanks for later refinement or burn it off in a §bFlare Stack§f to prevent clogging.

§6Processing§f:
Crude Oil must first be heated in a §bBoiler§f to become §bHot Crude Oil§f before it can be refined. The §bOil Refinery§f then separates hot crude oil into four primary fractions.

§eTip§f: You may notice patches of §boily dirt or sand§f on the surface — these indicate §bbedrock oil deposits§f which require a §bHydraulic Fracking Tower§f to extract. Mark their locations for later use.
